stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Over north-east Spain, a jet stream is flowing from north to south. At 40°N, 005°W, the notation "190/340" is displayed next to the jet axis.
Which of the following statements accurately explains this additional information?

options.a: Wind speeds associated with the jet can be expected to be between 190 kt and 340 kt.
options.b: The axis of the jet stream is aligned from 190° and curving to 340°.
options.c: Between FL190 and FL340 the wind speed is less than 120 kt.
options.d: Winds are greater than 80 kt between FL190 and FL340.
